subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen hath stirred, and desireth to make mention of His loved ones who have turned themselves unto the Dawning-Place of Revelation [3.5s]... ...My God, my God! Separation from Thee hath destroyed me, and the sorrow of Thine exile and the hardship Thou hast sustained in Thy path hath consumed me…  My God, my God! If Thou prevent me from drawing nigh unto Thee, being present before Thy throne... My God, my God! Thou dost behold the impoverished one who hath stood at the gate of Thy wealth, the ailing one
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تحرک القلم الأعلی و اراد ان یذکر اولیائه الذین اقبلوا الی مشرق وحی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
